text: My room is on the third floor. Now I am ready.
I leave my hotel. Now I go around the city.

Good morning. Which train goes to the city center?
Good morning. The train to the city center leaves from platform two.
Thank you. I would like a return ticket, please. How much is it?
A return ticket is eight pounds. Here you are.
Thank you. And which bus goes to the museum?
The number ten bus goes to the museum. The bus stop is outside.
Perfect. I take the train, then the bus. Thank you very much!
I would like a return ticket, please.
How much is a ticket?
The train leaves from platform two.

Good morning. Welcome to City Station. Here is some travel information for today. The train to the city center leaves from platform two. The bus to the museum stops outside the station. For a short trip, buy a single ticket. For the same day back, buy a return ticket. The subway is fast, and the next train is in five minutes. Please have your ticket ready. Have a good trip.

Hi, I am Gabriela. Today I explore the city. First, I leave my hotel and walk to the station. I buy a return ticket for the train. The train to the city center leaves from platform two. After the train, I take the bus to the museum, and the bus stop is right outside. In the afternoon, I am tired, so I take a taxi back to my hotel. The subway, the bus, and the train are all easy. I am very happy.

First, Gabriela leaves her hotel and walks to the station. Then she buys a return ticket for the train. After that, she takes the train from platform two to the city center. Next, she takes the bus to the museum. Finally, she takes a taxi back to her hotel.
